drizzle-upsert-increment.rule: accumulator columns use sql`${table.col} + ${value}` in onConflictDoUpdate; non-accumulator columns use direct assignment

task-status-enum.rule: tasksTable.status enum and taskStatusSchema z.enum must be kept in sync — both list the same values

tool-error-throw.rule: all operational errors use `throw new ToolError('CODE', message)` where CODE is in AgentMcpErrorCode
